chunks.text: David Friedberg welcomes Agriculture Secretary Brooke Rollins!
How she ended up in Trump's two administrations, history of the USDA
Trump's first 100 days, what needs to be reformed in the USDA
SNAP's massive impact on USDA budget: soda, obesity, health challenges; how being DC outsiders helps the Trump Administration
How she reconciles running a department with a lot of government intervention after coming from a free market background
State of US farming in 2025, labor costs, opening up new markets, and more
